## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`bun run test`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`bun run typecheck`)
- [ ] Docs updated (README/CONTRIBUTING/etc.) when behavior changed
- [ ] Changelog updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] No secrets in code, logs, or screenshots

## Risk assessment

- [ ] This change touches auth/secrets/workflow token behavior
- [ ] This change touches prompt/skill loading from untrusted paths
- [ ] This change affects review posting/inlines/fallback behavior

## Validation notes

Describe what you tested and link any relevant Actions runs.
